title: UnionExec sometimes receives data truncated error from children when casting string to decimal
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test2 ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, amount DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT NULL );
INSERT INTO test1(bglac) SELECT SUM(COALESCE(amount::DECIMAL(21,3), 0)) FROM test2;
key_bug_features: Data truncated error when casting string to decimal
